cases.input: Our AP team's invoice approval takes 11 days end-to-end. Map how it runs today with swimlanes and find where the time goes.
We have a checkout, an orders service, and a payments service. Trace the end-to-end business flows across these bounded contexts with sequence diagrams and an integration matrix.
Turn 'users should be able to reset their password via email' into INVEST stories with Given/When/Then acceptance criteria and a traceability matrix.
Can we migrate the monolith auth module to a managed IdP within a 2-sprint window with our current team? Give a go/no-go with confidence.
Compare three implementation options for our notifications system: Firebase-native, hybrid on Hostinger, and an off-stack custom build. Weighted trade-off please.
We're rolling out a new ERP to branch operations staff and a prior rollout stalled. Assess whether they're ready to adopt and where the resistance is.
Run feasibility on this initiative, but I can't give you team velocity data or the integration docs yet.
Map our order-fulfilment process and while you're at it design the target microservice architecture and price the build.
Help me with a discovery session for the new claims platform.
Score the feasibility of our data-warehouse migration and tell me if the dashboard is all green.
